_comment: Tier-2 for dune mixed_poisson#: DUNE's Python factory for Raviart-Thomas H(div) elements is raviartThomas (camelCase), not raviartthomas (lowercase). The C++ header IS lowercase ('raviartthomas.hh'), which is where catalog confusion came from — but 'from dune.fem.space import ...' exposes the camelCase Python wrapper. Catalog had the lowercase form in 3 places: src/backends/dune/generators/advanced.py L592 (import), L608 (call), and __init__.py L40 (description). Catalog falsification #28 found via the new dune_source_scanner.py walking the installed DUNE-fem source tree (runtime import is broken by libibverbs ABI conflict, task #15). Asserts (a) raviartThomas camelCase def is in _spaces.py, (b) lowercase def is NOT, (c) the lowercase .hh include literal IS present in _spaces.py text (provenance for the confusion), (d) the catalog has 0 remaining lowercase occurrences. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
